# 🎯 Task 02.5: Quality Gate

## 📅 Sprint Info
- **Duration:** 3 days
- **Milestone:** M1 - Core Retrieval
- **Priority:** P1 (Important)
- **Depends On:** Task 02.4 (Deduplication) ✅
- **Blocks:** Task 02.6 (Performance)
- **Assignee:** TBD

## 🎬 What You'll Build
Universal quality filter for low-quality pages: short content, boilerplate, ad-heavy, regardless of language. Also includes page-experience signals (HTTPS, mobile-friendliness indicators) that Google has made explicit ranking factors.

## 📋 Daily Breakdown

### Day 1: Quality Metrics
- [ ] Content length heuristics (minimum 100 words of real content after boilerplate removal)
- [ ] Text/HTML ratio calculation (flag pages with <15% text ratio)
- [ ] Boilerplate detection (nav, footer, cookie banners excluded from word count)
- [ ] Language-agnostic quality scoring
- [ ] **HTTPS signal:** HTTPS pages receive +0.05 quality bonus; HTTP-only pages receive -0.03 penalty
- [ ] **Charset/encoding signal:** Pages with encoding errors or mojibake (garbled text) flagged as low quality
- [ ] **Mobile-friendliness indicators** (crawl-time signals only, no browser rendering):
  - Presence of `<meta name="viewport">` tag
  - Font size not explicitly set to <12px
  - Tap targets (links, buttons) not excessively dense (>50 per screen-height estimate)

### Day 2: Filtering Rules
- [ ] Implement quality thresholds
- [ ] Multi-language validation
- [ ] Integration with index pipeline
- [ ] Test with good/bad pages

### Day 3: Validation & Tuning
- [ ] Measure filtering impact
- [ ] Precision/recall tuning
- [ ] A/B test quality gate
- [ ] Documentation

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Filters ≥80% low-quality pages
- [ ] False positive rate <5%
- [ ] Works across all languages
- [ ] Processing: 10K+ docs/sec
- [ ] HTTPS bonus/penalty correctly applied
- [ ] Mobile viewport tag detection works
- [ ] Pages with <100 words of real content always filtered (after boilerplate removal)
- [ ] Pages with <15% text/HTML ratio flagged as ad-heavy

## 🎉 Celebration Criteria
✅ **Demo:** Show before/after quality filtering  
✅ **Clean:** 80%+ junk removed  

**🎊 Celebration:** Only quality content!

## 📦 Deliverables
- `src/search/QualityGate.cpp` (200 lines)
- `tests/quality_test.cpp` (80+ cases)

## 🚀 Next Steps
➡️ **Task 02.6: Performance Optimization** (4 days)
